name: ritual-chamber-bright
summary: A chamber prepared for divine or celestial rites — a great circle inscribed in the floor, concentric pillars, bright light pouring from above or from sanctified fires. Clean, ordered, reverent.

size_guidance.aspect_ratio: square or circular — the circle is the room

accent.purpose: the ritual circle itself — a ring of different material

primary_palette.note: classic inscribed circle with four corner pillars
sigil-bound circle with tall candelabra at cardinal points
altar at center of an enclosing circle — a rite performed upon the altar
a sanctifying font inside a guarded perimeter

story_prompts: a rite mid-way — robed figures standing at the points of the circle, chanting
preparation in progress — chalk being drawn, candles still being placed
just concluded — aftermath of a successful rite, residue of divine presence
a binding ceremony — the circle holds something holy but not entirely safe
abandoned mid-rite — chalk half-drawn, a toppled candle, no one in the room

lighting_notes.ambient_intent: bright and clean (0.5-0.6) — the chamber is literally and spiritually illuminated

anti_patterns: the circle is centered in the room — radial symmetry matters here
no clutter inside the circle; nothing crosses the inscribed line casually
avoid any corrupt or necrotic iconography — this is a bright rite
